summary: Review the mesh quality before continuing with the simulation setup. Elements with very small or very large angles, as well as degenerate elements, can cause errors during the calculation.
actions:
On the Edit tab, click Check Mesh Quality to start the mesh quality review.
Review the report in the Check Mesh Quality window. Pay attention to the number of elements with angles outside the allowed range and the number of degenerate elements.
Look at the model and review the elements marked as problematic.
If defective elements are detected, click Correct. In our example, the mesh does not contain errors, so correction is not required.
Close the window when the mesh review is complete.
expected:
The mesh quality will be reviewed. If problematic elements are detected, PoligonSoft will try to correct them and update the mesh quality report.
Keep in mind that the calculation can still be run even if the model contains some defective elements. The correction mechanism is used to minimize their number before continuing.
